reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
It would be helpful if they added more staff on long weekends so people don't have to wait in such long queues.

reviews.comment:
Siempre me llamó la atención la fila de autos que se arma para cargar combustible pero creo que es por una cuestión de "costumbre" que tenemos quienes frecuentamos esta estación de servicio en particular.

(Translated by Google)
I've always been struck by the line of cars that forms to fill up with fuel, but I think it's due to a matter of "habit" that those of us who frequent this particular gas station have.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2aF82ckVREAE

reviews.comment:
La espera para cargar es un desastre, no usan todos los surtidores y eso hace que se formen colas de 1 cuadra para cargar.

(Translated by Google)
The wait to refuel is a disaster; they don't use all the pumps, which causes queues to form a block long.
